figures.caption: Figure 1: MVOS_HSI end-to-end workflow for leaf-level hyperspectral preprocessing.
Figure 3: Example spectral profiles produced by MVOS_HSI plotting utilities, enabling comparison of spectral profiles across multiple leaf samples.
Figure 2: Example leaf segmentation and clipping workflow using a vegetation index (e.g., NDVI) and objective thresholding (Otsu).
